title.description: An eyecatching title between 10-15 words that captures the essence of the news story. All currency amounts must be converted to USD and displayed with $ symbol, rounded to two significant digits.

summary.description: A short, 1-paragraph TL;DR that summarizes the key points of the news story in 2-3 sentences. All figures rounded to two significant digits.

article.description:
The complete news article with 3-5 well-structured paragraphs in HTML format. Use

tags for paragraphs and tags for links. If a company link is available, link the company name on first mention. For the primary funding amount (or main financial figure), show both original currency and USD conversion in format: €7.1m (approx. $8.4m). All figures rounded to two significant digits. Must end with

followed by a newsletter footer paragraph mentioning this is from Pitch Guide's All Funding Rounds under $20m newsletter with a subscription link to https://haje.pub/20 naturally embedded in the text. Vary the wording of the footer each time.

image_prompt.description: A simple, visual 5-10 word phrase describing a scene that could be used to generate an accompanying image for the article
